name: Lion's Head Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 6 Large Bok choy cabbage leaves, washed
2 Tablespoons Chopped green onions and tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from bok choy; chop enough to measure 1 cup. Place leaves in a 9 x 13-inch microwave-safe baking dish; add enough warm water to fill the dish halfway. Cover and microwave on High for 5 minutes.
2. Remove leaves and cool with cold water; drain. Spread leaves out flat on paper towels; set aside.
3. Thoroughly combine ground beef, ground pork, imitation crab meat, Kikkoman Stir-Fry Sauce (1/3 Cup), chopped green onions and tops, minced ginger root, and remaining 1 tablespoon Kikkoman Stir-Fry Sauce in a bowl.
4. Divide the mixture into 6 equal portions and shape each into a meatball.
5. Enclose each meatball in a bok choy leaf; place all in the baking dish.
6. Cover and microwave on Medium-high (70%) for 6 minutes.
7. Uncover, brush tops lightly with Kikkoman Stir-Fry Sauce, cover again, and microwave on Medium-high (70%) for 7 minutes longer.
8. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
